rationale: Spiller et al. (2013) is cited at the point where the authors conduct their follow-up moderation analysis, not merely in a general literature list. The citing paper explicitly states that it applies the Johnson-Neyman procedure from that source to probe a significant interaction in Study 4. This citation therefore has a concrete analytical role in testing and interpreting reported effects.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Spiller et al. (2013)'s interaction-probing guidance by using the Johnson-Neyman procedure to determine the moderator values at which the condition effect on product neglect is significant.
